name: io.github.seatable/seatable
description: MCP server for SeaTable — read, write, search, link, and query data in your bases

environmentVariables.name: SEATABLE_SERVER_URL
environmentVariables.description: URL of your SeaTable server (e.g. https://cloud.seatable.io)

environmentVariables.name: SEATABLE_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: API token for a single SeaTable base
